details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level directories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are present; reports/audit/ exists, but reports/board/ is missing.
reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has docs, .cursor/automations/ has README + specs, reports/audit/ exists — but reports/board/ is absent.

Moltbot references found in code: moltbot/board.py, moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py (active code directory).
